title: apply automation to workspace
excerpt:
HI 
wouldn’t it be a great idea to add an automation to a workspace 
Example: 
i have a workspace with all my active projects each board is a separate project 
i want every automation i add to this workspace should apply…

posts.author: plansdept (Avrumy)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI
wouldn’t it be a great idea to add an automation to a workspace
Example:
i have a workspace with all my active projects each board is a separate project
i want every automation i add to this workspace should apply to all boards
